title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-alpn-policy (beta)
text:
Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-alpn-policy: HTTP2Optional
Used on: Service
The
AWS load balancer controller
uses this annotation.
See
annotations
in the AWS load balancer controller documentation.

Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-attributes: "deletion_protection.enabled=true"
Used on: Service
The
AWS load balancer controller
uses this annotation.
See
annotations
in the AWS load balancer controller documentation.
